---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour in a non-backward-compatible way)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change, internal code improvement)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement (adds or fixes tests without changing production code)
- [ ] Dependency update

---

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover the changed behaviour
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`vendor/bin/pest`)
- [ ] I have run `vendor/bin/pint` and fixed any style issues
- [ ] I have tested the change manually in a real Laravel application
- [ ] I have updated the `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if the public API or usage instructions changed

---
